hero.title: Track Sustainable Development Across Africa
hero.subtitle: DevMapper empowers communities to report, verify, and track development projects aligned with the UN Sustainable Development Goals and AU Agenda 2063.

features.title: Everything You Need to Track Impact
features.subtitle: A comprehensive platform designed for communities, organizations, and governments to monitor and celebrate sustainable development.
features.interactiveMappingDesc: Visualize development projects across Africa with real-time geospatial data and filtering.
features.communityVerificationDesc: Crowdsourced verification ensures data accuracy through local community validation.
features.realTimeAnalyticsDesc: Track SDG progress with comprehensive dashboards, charts, and exportable reports.
features.sdgAgendaDesc: Align projects with UN SDGs and African Union Agenda 2063 goals automatically.
features.esgReportingDesc: Comprehensive ESG metrics tracking for corporations with scenario analysis tools.
features.partnerNetworkDesc: Connect with NGOs, governments, and corporations working toward shared goals.

whyNow.title: Why Development Tracking Matters
whyNow.subtitle: Unprecedented convergence of urgency, opportunity, and technology creates the perfect moment for community-driven development tracking in Africa.
whyNow.deadlineDesc: With only 5 years until the UN SDG deadline, tracking progress has never been more critical. Every project counted brings us closer to achieving global development goals.
whyNow.momentumDesc: Africa is experiencing unprecedented economic growth and infrastructure development. Capturing this momentum through proper tracking ensures sustainable, equitable progress.
whyNow.digitalDesc: Mobile penetration across Africa has reached new heights, enabling community-driven data collection at scale. Technology is finally meeting the moment.
whyNow.esgDesc: International investors increasingly require ESG-compliant project data. DevMapper bridges the gap between African development and global impact investment standards.

howItWorks.title: How DevMapper Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our platform connects communities, governments, and organizations to create transparency in development projects.
howItWorks.reportDesc: Citizens can report development projects in their communities with location data and photos.
howItWorks.verifyDesc: Multiple community members verify project details to ensure accuracy and prevent misinformation.
howItWorks.trackDesc: Monitor project progress against SDG targets with real-time analytics and impact measurements.

map.title: Explore Projects with Earth Intelligence
map.subtitle: Visually track projects with real-time Earth observation data including vegetation, water, urban development, and emissions.

impact.title: Our Impact in Numbers
impact.subtitle: Real data from real communities driving sustainable development across Africa.

cta.title: Ready to Map Development in Your Community?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of change makers, NGOs, and governments tracking sustainable development across Africa aligned with UN SDGs and AU Agenda 2063.
cta.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Free forever for individual reporters

footer.tagline: Empowering communities to track sustainable development across Africa.
footer.copyright: © 2025 DevMapper. Built for sustainable development in Africa.
